title: New formulations
abstract: There is provided a pharmaceutical formulation of the compound of formula I, wherein the pharmaceutical formulation is obtained by a process which involves milling said compound, or a mixture containing said compound. This formulation finds particular utility in the treatment or prevention of a disorder or condition ameliorated by the activation of AMPK.
claims: Claims Claims 1. A pharmaceutical formulation comprising a compound of formula I, wherein the pharmaceutical formulation is obtained by a process which involves milling said compound or a mixture containing said compound. 2. The pharmaceutical formulation according to Claim 1 , wherein the bioavailability of the compound of formula I is increased compared to the bioavailability of the compound of formula I in a pharmaceutical formulation in which the compound of formula I has not been milled. 3. The formulation according to Claim 1 or Claim 2, wherein the formulation comprises particles containing the compound of formula I, said particles having a particle size distribution defined by (a) a D50 of less than about 6 pm and a D90 of less than about 14 pm or (b) a Z-average diameter of less than about 1000 nm. 4. A formulation comprising particles containing a compound of formula I, wherein the particles have a particle size distribution defined by (a) a D50 of less than about 6 pm and a D90 of less than about 14 pm or (b) a Z-average diameter of less than about 1000 nm. 5. The formulation according to Claim 4, wherein the particles are obtained by a process which involves milling said compound, or a mixture containing said compound. 6. The formulation according to any one of Claims 3 to 5, wherein the particles have a particle size distribution defined by: (i) a D50 of from about 2 pm to about 6 pm and a D90 of from about 6 pm to about 14 pm; (ii) a D50 of from about 3 pm to about 5.5 pm and a D90 of from about 6 pm to about 13 pm; (iii) a D50 of from about 3 pm to about 5 pm and a D90 of from about 6 pm to about 12 pm; (iv) a D50 of from about 3 pm to about 4 pm and a D90 of from about 6 pm to about 9 pm (v) a Z-average diameter of from about 20 nm to about 800 nm; (vi) a Z-average diameter of from about 20 nm to about 600 nm; (vii) a Z-average diameter of from about 25 nm to about 200 nm; or (viii) a Z-average diameter of from about 25 nm to about 100 nm. 7. The formulation according to any one of the preceding claims, wherein the formulation further comprises at least one pharmaceutically acceptable excipient. 8. The formulation according to Claim 7, wherein the at least one pharmaceutically acceptable excipient is selected from the group consisting of a lubricant, a binder, a filler, a surfactant, a diluent, an anti-adherent, a coating, a flavouring, a colourant, a glidant, a preservative, a sweetener, a disintegrant, an adsorbent, a buffering agent, an antioxidant, a chelating agent, a dissolution enhancer, a dissolution retardant and a wetting agent. 9. The formulation according to Claim 7 or Claim 8, wherein the formulation comprises PVP K30, Na-docusate and mannitol. 10. The formulation according to any one of the preceding claims, wherein the formulation is in the form of a tablet, mini-tablets, blocks, pellets, particles, granules or a powder. 1 1. The formulation according to Claim 10, wherein the formulation further comprises an enteric coating. 12. A capsule containing a formulation as defined in any one of the preceding claims. 13. The capsule according to Claim 12, wherein the capsule further comprises an enteric coating. 14. The formulation according to Claim 1 1 or the capsule according to Claim 13, wherein the enteric coating comprises beeswax, shellac, an alkylcellulose polymer resin (e.g. ethylcellulose polymers, carboxymethylethylcellulose, or hydroxypropyl methylcellulose phthalate) or an acrylic polymer resin (e.g. acrylic acid and methacrylic acid copolymers, methacrylic acid copolymers, methyl methacrylate copolymers, ethoxyethyl methacrylates, cyanoethyl methacrylate, methyl methacrylate, copolymers, methacrylic acid copolymers, methyl methacrylate copolymers, methyl methacrylate copolymers, methacrylate copolymers, methacrylic acid copolymer, aminoalkyl methacrylate copolymer, methacrylic acid copolymers, methyl methacrylate copolymers, poly(acrylic acid), poly(methacrylic acid, methacrylic acid alkylamide copolymer, poly(methyl methacrylate), poly(methacrylic acid) (anhydride), methyl methacrylate, polymethacrylate, methyl methacrylate copolymer, poly(methyl methacrylate), poly(methyl methacrylate) copolymer, polyacrylamide, aminoalkyl methacrylate copolymer, poly(methacrylic acid anhydride), glycidyl methacrylate copolymers), cellulose acetate phthalate, and polyvinyl acetate phthalate. 15. Use of a formulation as defined in any one of Claims 1 to 1 1 or 14, or a capsule as defined in anyone of Claims 12 to 14, in the manufacture of a medicament for the treatment of a disorder or condition ameliorated by the activation of AMPK. 16. A method of treatment of a disorder or condition ameliorated by the activation of AMPK comprising administering to a subject in need thereof a therapeutically effective amount of a formulation as defined in any one of Claims 1 to 1 1 or 14, or a capsule as defined in any one of Claims 12 to 14. 17. The use according to Claim 15 or the method according to Claim 16, where in the disorder or condition ameliorated by the activation of AMPK is type 2 diabetes. 18. The use according to Claim 15 or the method according to Claim 16, where in the disorder or condition ameliorated by the activation of AMPK is cancer. 19. A process for preparing a formulation as defined in any one Claims 1 to 1 1 or 14, wherein the process comprises milling the compound of formula I, optionally together with one or more excipients, to produce particles defined by (a) a D50 of less than about 6 pm and a D90 of less than about 14 pm or (b) a Z-average diameter of less than about 1000 nm. 20. The process according to Claim 19, wherein the process comprises wet milling. 21. The process according to Claim 19, wherein the process comprises dry milling, optionally wherein the dry milling involves jet milling.
